explanation.summary: Fats are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in B tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in B tier with an overall score of 45 from a base nutrition score of 42. Context lifted it by 3 points.

topPros.title: very practical staple food

topCons.title: glycemic behaviour is only middling

closing.summary: White Potato does have some solid upside. but the tradeoffs keep it from climbing higher. best when you want practical carbs and the rest of the profile is still reasonably clean.
